prompt: An authentic Art Nouveau botanical illustration from the 1890s depicting the logic of a Decision Tree classification algorithm. The illustration features a central stylized plant structure with sinuous, organic whiplash curves. The main stem branches out hierarchically, splitting into progressively smaller stems. At each branching point, elegant, muted earthy tone floral nodes represent decision splits, leading to final distinct flower types at the leaf nodes (representing classified categories). The composition uses characteristic flat, decorative borders, muted organic greens, soft ochres, and pale golds. Visible intricate linework typical of late 19th-century lithography. No modern text, mathematical symbols, or photographic shading. Purely a late 19th-century Art Nouveau visual grammar applied to the algorithmic concept of hierarchical branching.
tradition_approach: Employed Art Nouveau's characteristic sinuous whiplash curves, earthy tones, and organic plant structures to represent hierarchical branching, blending an algorithmic decision tree logic with stylized, flowing natural forms and flat lithographic linework.
